notableEvents.label: Nicky Lopez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez grounds into a double play, first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to shortstop Ernie Clement. Kyle Higashioka out at 2nd. Nicky Lopez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wyatt Langford GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wyatt Langford grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Wyatt Langford out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Nicky Lopez to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Ernie Clement out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez lines out to first baseman Jake Burger.
